zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Banastre於1134年出生在英國時，她的父親Thurstan Banastre16歲，母親Cecily Mahout18歲。她和William de Hastings至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1222年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Banastre was born in 1134, in England, her father, Thurstan Banastre, was 16 and her mother, Cecily Mahout, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with William de Hastings. She died in 1222, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Banastre est née en 1134, à Angleterre, son père, Thurstan Banastre, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Cecily Mahout, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec William de Hastings. Elle est décédée en 1222, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Banastre 1134 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thurstan Banastre 16 und ihre Mutter Cecily Mahout 18. Sie hatte mit William de Hastings mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1222 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Banastre è nata il nel 1134 nel England, sua padre, Thurstan Banastre, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Cecily Mahout, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con William de Hastings. Morì nel 1222, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Banastreが1134年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thurstan Banastreは16歳，母Cecily Mahoutは18歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Hastingsとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1222年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Banastre(이)가 1134년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thurstan Banastre(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Mahout(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 William de Hastings(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Banastre nasceu em 1134, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thurstan Banastre, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Mahout, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com William de Hastings. Ela faleceu em 1222, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Banastre родилась в 1134 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Thurstan Banastre было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Mahout, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от William de Hastings. Она умерла в 1222 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Banastre nació en 1134, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thurstan Banastre, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Cecily Mahout, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con William de Hastings. Murió en 1222, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 88 años.
